task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

content.text: Let me first check your working directory for any existing files that might have relevant context (notes, plans, etc.) for the Q3 kickoff.

content.content: ERROR: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: ''

content.text: No existing files to reference, so I'll craft a well-structured 90-minute Q3 kickoff agenda from scratch and save it now.

input.content:
================================================================
               Q3 KICKOFF MEETING — AGENDA
================================================================
Duration:  90 Minutes
Format:    [In-Person / Virtual — update as needed]
Date/Time: [Date & Time — update as needed]
Location:  [Room / Video Link — update as needed]
Facilitator: [Name — update as needed]

----------------------------------------------------------------
MEETING OBJECTIVES
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • Align the team on Q3 goals, priorities, and success metrics
  • Surface dependencies, risks, and resource considerations
  • Ensure every team member leaves with clear ownership and
    next steps

================================================================
AGENDA
================================================================

[0:00 – 0:05]  1. WELCOME & HOUSEKEEPING                (5 min)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • Facilitator opens the meeting
  • Quick logistics (recording notice, parking-lot process,
    how to ask questions)
  • Confirm agenda and timing with attendees

----------------------------------------------------------------
[0:05 – 0:20]  2. Q2 RETROSPECTIVE SNAPSHOT             (15 min)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • High-level recap of Q2 results vs. targets
  • Key wins to celebrate and carry forward
  • Lessons learned / what we'll do differently in Q3
  Presenter: [Name]

----------------------------------------------------------------
[0:20 – 0:45]  3. Q3 GOALS & STRATEGIC PRIORITIES       (25 min)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • Company / department OKRs for Q3 — what they are and
    why they matter
  • Team-level goals that ladder up to company priorities
  • Definition of success: KPIs and target metrics
  • How Q3 fits into the broader annual roadmap
  Presenter: [Name]

----------------------------------------------------------------
[0:45 – 1:00]  4. INITIATIVES, ROADMAP & OWNERSHIP      (15 min)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • Walk through key Q3 initiatives / projects
  • Assign DRIs (Directly Responsible Individuals) for each
  • Milestone dates and major deadlines
  • Cross-team dependencies to flag early
  Presenter: [Name]

----------------------------------------------------------------
[1:00 – 1:10]  5. RISKS, BLOCKERS & RESOURCE NEEDS      (10 min)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • Known risks or constraints (headcount, budget, tooling)
  • Open blockers that need leadership decisions
  • Process for escalating new risks during the quarter
  Facilitator: [Name] | Open discussion

----------------------------------------------------------------
[1:10 – 1:20]  6. TEAM NORMS & OPERATING RHYTHM         (10 min)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • Agreed ways of working for Q3 (standups, check-ins,
    reporting cadence)
  • Communication channels and escalation paths
  • Any tooling or process changes taking effect in Q3
  Presenter: [Name]

----------------------------------------------------------------
[1:20 – 1:25]  7. Q&A / OPEN DISCUSSION                  (5 min)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • Address questions raised during the meeting
  • Surface anything not yet covered
  Facilitator: All attendees

----------------------------------------------------------------
[1:25 – 1:30]  8. WRAP-UP & NEXT STEPS                   (5 min)
----------------------------------------------------------------
  • Summarize key decisions made today
  • Confirm action items, owners, and due dates
  • Preview of first Q3 team check-in (date / format)
  • Facilitator closes the meeting
  Presenter: [Facilitator Name]

================================================================
ACTION ITEMS TRACKER (to be completed during meeting)
================================================================
  #  | Action Item                  | Owner    | Due Date
  ---|------------------------------|----------|----------
  1  |                              |          |
  2  |                              |          |
  3  |                              |          |
  4  |                              |          |

================================================================
PARKING LOT (items to follow up on after the meeting)
================================================================
  •
  •
  •

================================================================
Notes compiled by: [Name]
Distributed to:    [Distribution list]
================================================================

content.text:
The agenda has been saved as **q3_kickoff_agenda.txt**! Here's a summary of how the 90 minutes are structured:

| # | Section | Time | Duration |
|---|---------|------|----------|
| 1 | Welcome & Housekeeping | 0:00 | 5 min |
| 2 | Q2 Retrospective Snapshot | 0:05 | 15 min |
| 3 | Q3 Goals & Strategic Priorities | 0:20 | 25 min |
| 4 | Initiatives, Roadmap & Ownership | 0:45 | 15 min |
| 5 | Risks, Blockers & Resource Needs | 1:00 | 10 min |
| 6 | Team Norms & Operating Rhythm | 1:10 | 10 min |
| 7 | Q&A / Open Discussion | 1:20 | 5 min |
| 8 | Wrap-Up & Next Steps | 1:25 | 5 min |

**A few things to customize before sharing:**
- 📅 Fill in the **date, time, and location/link**
- 👤 Assign **presenters** to each section
- 🎯 Add your specific **Q3 OKRs and KPIs** to section 3
- 📋 Populate the **initiatives and roadmap** in section 4

The file also includes an **Action Items Tracker** and a **Parking Lot** section to capture decisions and follow-ups in real time during the meeting. Let me know if you'd like to adjust the timing, add topics, or send it out to attendees!
